mapper.select: SELECT s.sale_id, s.store_id, s.staff_id, s.customer_id, s.sale_date, s.total_amount, s.discount_amount, s.payment_method, s.source, s.is_refunded AS refunded, st.name AS store_name, sf.name AS staff_name, c.name AS customer_name FROM sales s JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id LEFT JOIN staff sf ON s.staff_id = sf.staff_id LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE s.sale_id = #{saleId}

SELECT si.item_id, si.sale_id, si.variant_id, si.quantity, si.unit_price, si.discount_rate, p.name AS product_name, pv.sku FROM sale_items si JOIN product_variants pv ON si.variant_id = pv.variant_id JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.product_id WHERE si.sale_id = #{saleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales (store_id, staff_id, customer_id, total_amount, discount_amount, payment_method, source) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{staffId}, #{customerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, 'manual')
INSERT INTO sale_items (sale_id, variant_id, quantity, unit_price, discount_rate) VALUES (#{saleId}, #{variantId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{discountRate})
mapper.update: UPDATE sales SET is_refunded = 1 WHERE sale_id = #{saleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS sale_count, ISNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_sales, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'cash' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cash_amount, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'card' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS card_amount FROM sales WHERE CAST(sale_date AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND is_refunded = 0 AND store_id = #{storeId}
